steps.t: The Elf waypoint can be found marked by a stone to the north of Emyn Lûm. You should scout the first waypoint of the patrol that Fuirgam has asked you…
The Elf waypoint can be found marked by a stone to the north-east of Emyn Lûm. You should scout the second waypoint of the patrol that Fuirgam has ask…
The Elf waypoint can be found marked by a stone to the east of Emyn Lûm. You should scout the third waypoint of the patrol that Fuirgam has asked you …
The Elf waypoint can be found marked by a stone to the south-east of Emyn Lûm. You should scout the fourth waypoint of the patrol that Fuirgam has ask…
Fuirgam is at Ost Galadh. You should return to Fuirgam and report in.
